cards.title: Managing In-Laws Before Having Children
cards.body: If your partner's parent is cruel to them, it's reasonable to minimize contact with future children unless they change. Setting boundaries now protects your family's wellbeing and models healthy relationships.

cards.title: How Brains Sync in Happy Families
cards.body: When families engage without electronic devices, brains and socioemotional health improve significantly. Face-to-face interaction strengthens parent-child bonding and child development.

cards.title: Regret as a Parenting Teacher
cards.body: Regret in fatherhood, though painful, teaches men their shortcomings and guides them toward repair. It helps fathers become wiser, more intentional parents.

cards.title: Childcare Costs and Family Affordability
cards.body: Rising childcare costs threaten families' ability to afford raising children. Government spending must ensure affordability isn't undercut by hidden charges.

cards.title: Girls and Skincare Obsession Online
cards.body: Social media is driving a surge in children's skincare use, with some developing obsessive behaviors. Experts warn about long-term impacts on girls' mental health and self-image.
